Holdium is a Token Exclusively for Hodlers

The diamond hands. The believers. The true chads.
Connect Wallet
Connect manually

Holdium: The Genesis

Holdium is a token designed exclusively for the diehard hodlers of the Solana Ecosystem—the ones with diamond hands, unwavering conviction, and nerves of steel. The real champions of the crypto community.

True diamond hands are in it for the long term. They are the unsung heroes of the ecosystem, never breaking a sweat in the face of 90% drawdowns. They don’t obsessively check prices or anxiously wonder when to sell. They are the ones we want to celebrate.

After months of dedicated research, the team behind Holdium has crafted a token to reward these chads. Holdium is more than just a coin; it’s a symbol of pride, a badge of honor. It identifies you as a diamond hand, a true hodler.

In essence, Holdium represents the purest form of the crypto coin - it is the one coin you never sell.

Distribution Mechanism

Eligibility‍

  • Holdium will be distributed to current and past holders of the pre-selected list of meme coins.
  • The distribution will be proportional to the amount of meme coins held and the duration they’ve been held for. The more of the meme coin you hold and the longer you've held it, the more Holdium you receives.
  • Only wallets registered before July 12th will be eligible for the airdrop
  • Wallet registration will open on June 26th and close on July 12th.
  • The pre-selected list of meme coins to determine eligibility will be announced on June 26th on our twitter account.

Vesting and Airdrop‍‍

  • Holdium's airdrop allocation will be vested over 18 months.
  • Airdrops will occur monthly over this 18-month period.
  • The first round of airdrops will happen on July 15th.
  • To remain eligible for the monthly airdrop, holders must not sell or move their $HM. However, holders may participate in the community’s liquidity pool.

  • Paperhands beware! If you sell your allocation early, not only will the rest of your airdrops be burned, but we will also have to make sure your wallet remembers how much of a paperhand you are...

    Stay on the good list and hold strong! Who knows, we might have some surprises for the real diamond hands, too!

Check out how strong your diamond hands are

Follow these steps to secure your Holdium allocation:

step.one

Register your wallet
‍

Register your wallet (registration opens on June 26th) to discover how many Holdium points you are eligible for.

step.two

Register more wallets and refer your friends!

You have until July 12th to register all your wallets and send your referral link to your friends to secure as many points as you can while you patiently wait for the first airdrop.

step.three

Receive your first airdrop on July 15th!

On July 15th, your Holdium points will determine your $HM allocation. Your first airdrop of tokens will be directly sent to your wallet.

Leaderboard

Compare your score with others and see where you stand. Don't forget to add more wallets and refer your friends to maximize your points. The more points you earn, the bigger your $HM airdrop will be!

VIEW LEADERBOARD

What are the tokenomics?

⌬ Total Supply - 109
⌬ Airdrop - 66%
⌬ Solana Mobile - 5%
⌬ Liquidity - 5%
⌬ Treasury - 9%
⌬ Team - 15%

Solana Mobile: Chapter 2

Anyone who has preordered or preorders a Chapter 2 before July 12th will be eligible for our special airdrop.

5% of the total supply will be evenly split among all eligible users—no vesting!

FAQ

How long do I have to register my wallet?

You have until July 12th to register your wallets.

How many wallets can I submit?

You can submit as many wallets as you like

How can I get more points?

You can get more points by submitting more wallets and referring your friends. Earn 10% of the points of those you refer!

How do I stay eligible for Holdium airdrop?

Hodl or participate in the community’s liquidity pool.

What happens to the rest of my airdrop if I sell early?

The rest of your allocation will be burnt. Sorry, not sorry. Holdium is for hodlers only.

What is the roadmap?

There is none. Holdium doesn’t need a roadmap as it is already perfect. It is the purest form of crypto which is there to be held forever. It is the one token you never sell.
